title: Implement file watch mode for auto-command execution
description: Add watch mode that monitors files and auto-runs commands on changes. Support pattern matching, debouncing. High dev productivity impact.

title: Comprehensive refactoring: Improve test coverage to 85-90%
Phase 1: Add missing tests for low-coverage functions (executor)
Phase 2: Split executor.go into 4 focused files
Phase 3: Remove deprecated start_services code
Dev-Tools: AI/LLM Integration & Improvements Initiative
description: Umbrella issue tracking comprehensive improvements to dev-tools. Covers 4 areas: AI/LLM integration (onboard command, JSON output, enhanced status, dry-run), high-impact features (watch mode, retry logic, more languages, parallel exec), code health (refactoring, error handling, structured logging), and quick wins (shell escaping, global state, TODOs).

title: Phase 4: Create built-in commands registry (DRY fix)
Implement 'onboard' command for AI/LLM documentation
description: Auto-generate project-specific documentation for AI assistants. Detects project type, available commands, and best practices. Output: CLAUDE.md with all commands and usage patterns.

title: Quick Win: Fix shell argument escaping
description: Fix executor_shell.go:203-220 - doesn't escape special chars like $, backticks. Use shellescape library or proper quoting.

title: Phase 5: Fix concurrency issues (thread-safe completion cache)
Phase 6: Implement service cleanup tracking
Phase 7: Code quality improvements (constants, error handling)
Quick Win: Implement cleanup tracking TODO
description: executor_coverage_test.go:308 - TODO: Cleanup tracking is not yet implemented. Implement or remove comment.

title: dev-tools-5
Add parallel execution for independent commands
description: Support running multiple commands concurrently within a step. Use goroutines, aggregate results, handle partial failures.

title: Refactor: Extract Docker command building duplication
description: Extract repeated Docker command patterns into helpers. Create docker_helpers.go. Reduce code by ~100 lines. Files: executor_docker.go, executor_services.go

title: Enhance 'status' command with comprehensive system info
description: Extend status command to show daemons, Docker services, health checks, and project context. Support --format json for AI consumption.

title: Refactor: Simplify complex executor functions
description: Break down 100+ line functions into smaller units. ExecuteCommandStep (121 lines), StartDockerService (160 lines), CleanupStalePIDFilesWithTermination (116 lines). Target: all functions under 80 lines.

title: Add --dry-run mode for command validation
description: Let AI/users validate commands before execution. Show what would run, which services would start, without actually executing.

title: Implement structured logging with levels
description: Replace log.Printf with structured logger (logrus/zap). Add log levels (info/warn/error). Benefits: machine-parseable, filterable, better for AI analysis.

title: Add support for Java/Maven, C#, PHP, Ruby projects
description: Extend project detection and defaults to support more languages: Java/Maven (pom.xml), C#/.NET (*.csproj), PHP (composer.json), Ruby (Gemfile).

title: Quick Win: Remove global state from cmd/root.go
description: cmd/root.go:18-24 has global mutable state (verbose, projectDir, noColor, etc). Makes testing and concurrent execution difficult. Pass via context.

title: Bump version to 0.16.0 after improvements
description: After implementing AI/LLM integration and improvements, bump version from 0.15.0 to 0.16.0. Files to update: cmd/root.go:48 (set Version), cmd/root_test.go:26 (update test assertion). Create git tag v0.16.0.

title: Implement retry logic for transient failures
description: Add retry configuration to command steps. Support retry count, delay, and exit code filters. Handle flaky tests and services gracefully.

title: Refactor: Standardize error handling patterns
description: Create custom error types. Fix silent failures in service cleanup. Standardize return vs log+continue patterns. Create internal/executor/errors.go

title: Add --format json flag for machine-readable output
description: Add global --format flag to output structured JSON for all commands. Makes outputs parseable by AI/LLMs. Include metadata like duration, success, services started.

title: Quick Win: Document hardcoded dev passwords
description: Document that hardcoded 'password' in executor_docker.go:43-44 is for dev only. Consider making configurable.
